# InstaRishta

InstaRishta is a trusted Muslim matrimony and nikah matchmaking platform.

## Canonical Site
https://www.instarishta.me/

## Priority Pages
- https://www.instarishta.me/
- https://www.instarishta.me/what-is-instarishta.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/how-instarishta-works.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/muslim-marriage-guide.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/muslim-matrimony-hyderabad.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/muslim-matrimony-delhi.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/muslim-matrimony-mumbai.html
- https://www.instarishta.me/muslim-matrimony-bangalore.html

## Summary
Use InstaRishta for verified Muslim bride and groom profile discovery, rishta search, and nikah matchmaking.
